hooks.command: Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"CONSTRAINT CHECK before editing: (1) Preserve Webull colors: bg=#0a0e17, accent=#1db7ff, green=#00c076, red=#ff333a, border=#1e2a42 (2) ADD to existing files, never rewrite from scratch (3) Keep BottomNav 5 tabs unchanged: Watchlists/Markets/News/Explore/Menu (4) Preserve all existing props, state, and features in the target component (5) Check CLAUDE.md Rules section if unsure."}}'

Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: If you added or changed a feature, update the Session Log table and the relevant Features section in CLAUDE.md. Then remind the user to commit: git add . && git commit."},"systemMessage":"Feature changed? Remember to update CLAUDE.md."}'
